name: miu-cs472-2026-04-ts-oop
description: * Unique identifier * Name * List of grades # Create a class in the file `src/class.ts` to manage students: * Maintain a list of students * Allow adding new students * Provide a way to retrieve all students * Provide a way to calculate the average grade of a student # Create a main module in the file `src/main.ts` to test the system: * Create multiple students * Add them to the system * Display each student’s information * Display the average grade for each student
